entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA CDS Data Source for Product Change
entry.content:
Hi Jen,

Kindly check whether API_CHANGERECORDHISTORY could fulfil your requirements.

you could find more details in https://api.sap.com/api/CE_CHANGERECORDHISTORY_IWSV_0001/overview

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: Unable to delete the assignment of HU to Order
entry.content:
Hello @pradeepkumar21 

Indeed, the value of 08 "Work Order for Components" in VEKP-VPOBJ indicates HU assignment to a production order. However, I'm not entirely sure how this field is updated when a HU is issued to a production order and when the goods issue is cancelled subsequently. It's quite possible that the value is not updated. Thus my assumption that the HU is not actually assigned to the production order anymore is still valid.

You can't delete the assignment in COPAWA as the assignment is not visible there. That again reconfirms my assumption that the HU is not assigned anymore.

To validate that I'd suggest to try to assign the HU to another production order with COPAWA. If that is allowed, it means you don't have any problem and that the HU is simply not assigned to the production order after the goods issue cancellation with HUCANC. If on the other hand, you get any issues with the HU assignment to another production order, e.g. a message that the HU is already assigned, then I'd suggest to rise an incident to SAP support as such an error message would indicate data inconsistency.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Adapt UI depending on user role
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

can i create an UI in dependency of an user role or marketing area? 

For example: Some Users should see more Tabs or Custom Fields in the Contacts-App than others. 

Thanks for your help!
Katharina

entry.title: Eclipse ADT installation error
entry.content:
when installing ADT using below.

https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

I am getting error -


Software being installed: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA (Developer Edition) 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.devedition.feature.group 3.44.0)

Missing requirement: ABAP Communication Framework 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.fwk.ci.feature.group 3.44.0) requires 'org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; org.eclipse.emf.workspace.feature.group [1.7.0,2.0.0), greedy=false' but it could not be found

I have tried with Network - Direct, Native option also.

Any solution to this.

entry.title: Re: Sales Flow - Trading Company buy and sell same PO twi...

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content: I'm always amazed to see the amount of work that goes into Devtoberfest! It's a great run up to the SAP TechEd event. Looking forward to seeing all the coding and collaboration again this year. What a fantastic contest!

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi Olga, @OlgaDolinskaja 

Thank you for the quick response. But I'm confused. In the on-premise's RFC to the cloud connector, we have used the user which is created in SAP BTP via communication scenario SAP_COM_0936.

User ID  : CC0000000001  User Name : BTP_ATC_USR. We have used the user name "BTP_ATC_USR" in SM59 by following : sections 6.f. & 10.c.

 https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/using-sap-btp-system-as-atc-central-check-system?q=SAP_COM_0936

Thanks,

Roy

entry.title: Re: Receiving E-Invoices with SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
comprehensive guide for partners to realize E-Invoicing in SAP Business ByDesign, Looking forward for partners feedback.

Regards

Murthy

entry.title: SAP DM / EWM Goods issue of Non BOM items (Single Order Staging)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are using Order POD with EWM single order staging integration. But from time to time we have to consume a Non BOM item in production. To update the BOM in ERP is not an option, since the decission for those unplanned consumptions in made during running production. 

I tried to add the component in the BOM in DM only (worked fine) and with EWM we made an Ad-hoc stock transfer to a production storage place. In DM I can consume the production stock but not in EWM with the error message that the component is not part of the PMR. Do you know how to trigger from DM a consumption of a Non BOM component in EWM?

entry.title: Re: Changelog deletion with Process chain does not work
entry.content:
Can you please post a screenshot about the variant itself and also about the ADSO administration (via RSMNG request list)?

Btw. are the notes from the KBA 2821840 (which I mentioned earlier) installed?

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 1: Introduction to SAP Business AI
entry.content: Is there any end to end scenario in the SAP area, where the entire process is carried out bv AI without any involvement of the human and is being used in a real world scenario?

entry.title: Re: Walkthrough SAP Cloud ALM Process Authoring
entry.content:
Hi David,

That's correct. The copied Solution Process Flows will generate a new Custom Solution Process, which must be manually added to the scope once it is finalized and published. The 'Custom' scenario implementation should be included in the scope so that the new custom solution process can be selected. After it has been added to the scope, you can attach documents, user stories, and tasks to it.

The ability to preserve links for untouched artifacts (such as solution activities and gateways) is currently not available. We are aware of this limitation, but it would be helpful if you could add your request here so that other customers can vote for it as well.

I hope it helps!

Best Regards,

Mohamed.

entry.title: Adobe Custom PickList form in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to add a custom field in a pick list form.

 

1.I have created a custom field 'storage Bin' using app 'custom fields' and enable the usage in my custom form.

 

2. i have created a badi implementation using 'BD_COBADICFL_MFGORDER_CMP_INIT' badi, but the custom field which i created is not available in the BADI. 

Is there any step am i missed out? Can anyone help on this

entry.title: ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER does not upload file to AL11 path
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using FM ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER to upload file from my desktop to AL11 Path which works perfectly fine when I execute from SAP GUI but does not work when I execute from FIORI tile which calls the same program.

 

 gv_file_path = 'test123'.
    CONCATENATE gv_file_path '_' sy-datum '_' sy-uzeit INTO gv_file.
    CONDENSE gv_file.

    " Place file from Presentation server to the Application server
    CALL FUNCTION 'ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER'
      EXPORTING
        path             = gv_fileupd
        targetpath       = gv_file
      EXCEPTIONS
        error_file       = 1
        no_authorization = 2
        OTHERS           = 3.
    IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
"******** Read file from Application server(AL11) ***********
    OPEN DATASET gv_file FOR INPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      DO.
        READ DATASET gv_file INTO gwa_uphold_str.
        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          APPEND gwa_uphold_str TO gt_uphold_str.
          CLEAR : gwa_uphold_str.
        ELSE.
          EXIT.
        ENDIF.
      ENDDO.
    ELSE.
      MESSAGE 'File not found!' TYPE 'E'.
    ENDIF.
    CLOSE DATASET gv_file.

 

I believe the problem is with the dialog box which appears to ask for permission to upload file in Application server when I click on 'Yes' then it allows me to upload from SAP GUI but this dialog doesn't show up when I execute from FIORI tile where it gets stuck in the process because there is no user action performed to give permission to allow user to upload file due to which it does not upload file to AL11 path.

How to allow the permission to all users to allow to access to upload file in AL11 path automatically without asking any permission? Or any suggesstion how to proceed further would really help alot.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with...
entry.content:
Hi Paulo and Michael.

Paulo, are you able to provide any update since this last post? I will be in a similar situation where we are exploring the new S/4 for Product compliance module and the substance volume tracking features. Reading Michael's response, it looks like the "workaround" to create a new compliance requirements version from an existing best practice compliance requirement is the only solution we have if we want to create new customer-specific SVT compliance requirements with our own substance lists.

Have you implemented this solution, and what is your experience so far? And is there anything to watch out for?

Thanks

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/resource-orchestration/optimize-workforce-availability-using-schedule-labor-app?locale=en-US

"Capture employee time off to accurately track their unavailability during specific periods."

Does this mean a planner can register time off through DMC which is then integrated with SuccessFactors EC Time-Off? 

Is there any integration (now or on the roadmap) of time tracking through DMC with EC Time Tracking?

Best regards,

Pieter

Not sure it can works, because in this APP, Seems I can only see price one by one, not batch.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Can we restrict user to create a public version in SA...
entry.content:
Hi William,

This is not working as expected.

I tried to disable the managed option for the version dimension used in the model, but still it is allowing me to create a blank public version.

 

To restrict that, i tried to uncheck the manage option of Public Files but in that case user can create empty private version but not able to publish it on existing or new public version.

 

 

Please let me know, if there is any other possibility.

Thanks,

Saif

entry.title: Re: How to return deep json object in odata api
entry.content:
With OData V4 you can model deep json objects with complex types and collections of complex types:

<EntityType Name="X">
  <Key>
    <PropertyRef Name="id"/>
  </Key>
  <Property Name="id" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false"/>
  <Property Name="data" Type="test.Y"/>
  <Property Name="deepData" Type="Collection(test.Y)" Nullable="true"/>
</EntityType>
<ComplexType Name="Y">
  <Property Name="foo" Type="Edm.String"/>
  <Property Name="bar" Type="test.Z"/>
  <Property Name="baz" Type="Collection(test.Z)" Nullable="true"/>
</ComplexType>
<ComplexType Name="Z">
  <Property Name="x" Type="Edm.String"/>
  <Property Name="y" Type="Edm.String"/>
</ComplexType>

In JSON "data" will be an object, "deepData" an array of objects, and in both cases the objects have properties of type string, object, and array of object, respectively.

In CAP CDS the corresponding model would be

entity X {
  key id   :      String;
  data     :      Y;
  deepData : many Y;
}

type Y {
  foo :      String;
  bar :      Z;
  baz : many Z;
}

type Z {
  x : String;
  y : String;
}

Does this answer your question?

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT installation error
entry.content: Hi, this document might help: https://help.sap.com/doc/2e9cf4a457d84c7a81f33d8c3fdd9694/Cloud/en-US/inst_guide_abap_development_tools.pdf. Kind regards, Linda

entry.title: Setting about If I have a requirement to bill other customer for accounts receivable
entry.content:
Dear all,


Assume that clients A and B are registered as BP master.
If we have a requirement that the billing address for accounts receivable generated by client A should be client B, what settings should we make in BP to fulfill the requirement?

By the way, I am thinking it might be the head office code or the closing billing payee setting.

I would appreciate it if you could think of Public Cloud assumptions.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP CAP : Postgres on Azure
entry.content: We have the PostgreSQL database created directly in Azure, not in SAP BTP as a hyperscaler option. We are using SAP BTP Private Link to reach the database. I can read or create tables via Node.js (pg) modules. However, I want to try using a CAP (Cloud Application Programming) app. Can I still use the SAP CAP with the @cap-js/postgres module? I tried binding the private link to the SAP CAP application by creating an entity, but the deployment always fails. I could not make this work. Is there anything additional I need to configure to reach to the external DB?

Could you please provide guidance on the available enhancement or modification methods to achieve this?

Thank you!

They expect the same to be available in Public Cloud which is recurring exercise for doing the uploads.

Is it feasible to do the same using CUstom Business Objects ? Is BTP required for doing the same?

 

Regards

Deep

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: In SAC Hyperlink feature, is there a way to reach a specific Widget on click inside a story/page?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have two pages in a story. One page has KPIs from each department of the company. Other page has detailed graphs/widgets pertaining to those KPIs. I want user to be able to jump directly from certain KPI on Page 1 to its pertaining graph/widget on Page 2. However, i can only choose PAGE and not the certain graph/widget. I have to scroll down to the pertaining graph each time, and i want to be able to land directly on it. Is there anyway to do it?

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
CDS View Data Preview

Class

entry.title: Re: How to enable the SAP Desktop Office Integration for SAP GUI for HTML and SAP GUI for Java
entry.content:
Hi Hock,

the SAP note 3386113 only contains the import part of the Office integration for SAP GUI for HTML. The export functionality is not available as a downport, because it has dependencies to the XCO XLSX library which is only available with S/4HANA 2023.

An alternative for older releases is to use for example the ALV grid export functionality which includes the Excel export functionality. A simple example for displaying data in an ALV grid which can be exported to an Excel file can look like this:

data itab type table of sflight.

select * from sflight into table itab.

call function 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY'
  exporting i_structure_name = 'SFLIGHT'
  tables    t_outtab         = itab.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Reminder email of open tasks in My Inbox
entry.content:
Hi,

we work with an approval flow for PR's on item level.

Is there an email template available that can send an email with all open tasks in the My Inbox of the approver? If so, how can we set this up?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reminder email of open tasks in My Inbox
entry.content:
Dear User, 

the following link contains how to send reminders for pending approval items:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/40c92fe9016a4e6dba80316f01377eef.html?state=TEST&version=2408.500

 

About frequency and recipient  you can check the option in the App  manage workflow for Purchase Requisitions.

thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: My name is Mahmoud and I'm excited to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work for an organization called Edraky, which is focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across Africa and the middle-east. Our goal is to help companies successfully adopt and maximize the value of SAP solutions. I have already joined the Beginner Corner and look forward to engaging with the community, learning from experienced SAP professionals, and contributing what I can as a relative newcomer to the SAP ecosystem. Please feel free to reach out to me via private message now that I have been invited to the group. I'm eager to get started!

entry.title: Re: Possibility to influence VAT and CIT exchange rate da...
entry.content:
Hello,

You may have missed this answer:

Dear Cezary,

In S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition there is no possibility to switch to Country=Reporting Currency. 
There is only the following is possible:

 

That is why SAP has managed to get the Reporting Currency to the Manage Journal Entry basic view screen when you choose "Reporting Currency"

 

I hope this helps.
Best regards

 

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: UPDATE statement delete rows
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm a beginner in ABAP and I'm facing an issue while working with a copy of the SBOOK table. We've created a new table by copying SBOOK, but when I try to update a record to change the passenger name by using UPDATE statement the entire row gets deleted instead of just updating the field.

Could anyone help me understand why this might be happening and how to resolve it.

Thanks in advance. 

Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: Calling APIs from S/4 to SF/EC using Cloud Connector

I was just checking out if it was possible to use the cloud connector for that because the client was told that it could be used for that purpose and wanted to use it, but apparently it cannot (at least for this scenario). HTTPS requests will be done now to consume data from the SF/EC systems

entry.title: Re: Customizing Industry field in the Business Partner Master Data (S4H Cloud 1811)
entry.content: Hi- i did every setting that was said unfortunately i cant see industrys in identification tab . if you can tell me how to enable it

entry.title: From Monday Blues to Data Delights: My Geeky Hobby :)
entry.content: After a busy week, I relax by exploring the world of analytics. On weekends, I enjoy trying out new techniques, like improving data models, making queries faster, and creating dashboards that make data easy to understand. I love diving into the details, whether it's fixing a tricky dataset or designing a clear dashboard. Once I’m done, I write simple blogs to share my learnings and tips with others. I post these on LinkedIn, where I connect with fellow data enthusiasts. Also like to attend seminars and workshops over the weekend where I like to share and gain knowledge in my area of interest. It's my way of turning a stressful week into something fun and rewarding.

entry.title: Re: drop down field auto update on alv grid display
entry.content: The well-known problem of a GUI control not reflecting the changes done by program is this one: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/78155611/update-refresh-custom-control-to-reflect-new-data

entry.title: SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Early Adopter Care Program
entry.content:
How to benefit of the upcoming SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 version?

 

SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 and beyond

We plan to release the first version of SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 in Q4 2024. In order to accelerate the go live to production for early adopters, we plan to run an Early Adopter Care Program during first months of 2025, during which participants will be directly supported by Engineering Team. 

If you want to benefit from exclusive support from Product Group during this program, please register to Influence Opportunity Homepage - Customer Influence (sap.com)

 

What is the “Early Adopter Care” (EAC) Program?

The Early Adopter Care (EAC) program is designed to connect your company with the latest SAP solutions, helping you to simplify, transform, and digitalize your operations quickly.

By joining the EAC program, you become one of the first to adopt and benefit from new SAP software, including SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025.

 

Benefits of the “Early Adopter Care” (EAC) Program

Participants in the EAC program gain several advantages:

  • Direct Support: Receive dedicated support from the Early Adopter Care Project coach and the development organization, ensuring your critical issues are addressed promptly.
  • Feedback Opportunities: Provide input on the new software through feedback sessions and online surveys, influencing future developments and enhancements.
  • Enhanced Collaboration: Work closely with SAP and other early adopters to share insights and best practices.

 

How to Join the EAC Program?

To join the EAC program for SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025, follow these steps:

  •  Complete Online Form: Fill out the project scope form available online. Your participation will be confirmed upon review and approval.
  • Review prerequisites. Ensure your organization meets the following conditions:
    1. Possession of a licensed SAP solution.
    2. Clear internal setup for technical implementation.
    3. A dedicated project team with an assigned point-of-contact.

 

Key Dates to Retain

  • Registration Start: August 14th, 2024 
  • Release to Customer: December 04th, 2024
  • Registration End: December 06th, 2024
  • Program Kick-Off: December 16th, 2024

 

Conditions of Participation

Participation in the EAC program is voluntary and at the sole discretion of SAP.

Review the above prerequisites and make sure your organization meets the conditions.

SAP reserves the right to decide which customer projects are accepted into the program based on defined criteria. 

As we want to offer premium support, we will accept a very limited number of customers. To be part of this exclusive program, keep in mind that the earlier you register, higher chance you have to be selected as part of this program. 

 

Our SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Strategy

For more details, please consult the SAP Analytics Statement of Direction and the SAP BusinessObjects Maintenance Strategy document.

Our strategy is based on 3 pillars: reach more business users, increase power users’ productivity and reduce total cost of ownership.

We want SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform to remain a trusted, robust and scalable platform for enterprise reporting scenarios. Therefore, we will simplify the upgrade to new versions so that the whole process is quicker and safer, use standard authentication protocols to increase integration between systems and allow immediate access to key information in the BI Launch Pad.

We will certify the latest versions of supported platforms as well as the latest security standards. Likewise, we plan to certify new data sources and latest versions of already supported ones. Here again, we will focus on the most-widely adopted use cases: single source .unx universes and direct data connectivity.

SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence is a powerful business intelligence tool that enables organizations to make informed decisions based on actionable insights through an intuitive user interface. Its value proposition lies to its strong link to the Semantic Layer (universes) enabling an incomparable no-code ad-hoc query experience and in its ability to deliver real-time data analysis and reporting.

Within BI 2025, Web Intelligence will receive a significant upgrade, enabling users to go beyond transactional reporting and data preparation thanks to three main innovations:

  • We will enhance analytical reporting capabilities to allow users to create captivating dashboards, using an expanded array of new visualizations and interactive controls that can be used in new canvas formats bringing a richer interactive experience.
  • A new offline access capability will enable users to access data and reports on the go through a new offline artifact format: users will access insights, charts and data even without an internet connection, facilitating effortless sharing with others, with no SAP BusinessObjects dependency at all.
  • Efficiency will be enhanced and achieved through a user-friendly interface that simplifies report generation for everyone, from beginners to experts; streamlined creation workflows and advanced customization options will further enhance their productivity.

As the proven world standard of pixel-perfect reporting, SAP Crystal Reports (Windows only*) will continuously provide easy to consume, highly formatted and information rich documents with enhanced Crystal Reports viewer.

Within BI 2025, SAP Crystal Reports will focus on innovations to empower the transition to a strategic stack by providing more connection capabilities and reach more casual users with a brand-new desktop viewer:

  • With the new “SAP BW (DSL)” driver, users are able to connect and consume BW OLAP connections.
  • The enhanced relational Unx Universe connection keeps reports synchronized with underlying Universe, provides more filter options on data, and also allows delegating sorting and ranking to the underlying universe.
  • A brand-new desktop viewer for SAP Crystal Reports on Windows brings a faster and reliable experience to casual users and enables them to access reports even when disconnected.

 

Feedback and Support

SAP aims to continuously improve its solutions based on user feedback. As an EAC participant, you are encouraged to share your experiences through feedback sessions and online surveys. Additionally, you will benefit from the monitoring and support of your critical customer issues by the Early Adopter Care Project Coach and/or the development organization.

For further support and inquiries, please contact the SAP BOBJ Program Manager through the provided link.

 

Disclaimers!

  • SAP reserves the right to decide which customer projects are accepted into the program based on defined criteria.
  • Future developments are at the discretion of SAP and may change at any time for any reason without notice.
  • Dates are subject to change.
  • For best results, use the Chrome browser if you experience issues with the site or associated links.

By adhering to these guidelines and actively participating, you can maximize the benefits of the SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Early Adopter Care program and contribute to shaping the future of SAP solutions.

entry.title: Re: Matching, Reconciliation & Elimination
entry.content:
@markusl1 , it is possbile. But the standard posting scenario "SA001" hides the field customer(KUNNR), because it encourages using a different GL account for the adjustments. If you insist using the reconciliation account of the customer, you can show the field KUNNR in posting scenario. Follow the step below:

Tcode: ICAPS->Choose SA001-->Item Group-->Choose 1010-->Item Group Setting-->Choose Field "KUNNR" and "LIFNR"-->Set the "Option for Setting Field Value" to "0 Optional". 

Then, you can find the 2 fields in defining posting rule. In this way, you can remove field "RACCT" in the set field value section.

entry.title: SAP SSL RENEWAL – AN ALTERNATIVE WAY #ATR
entry.content:
#ATR (23) Informative

  • Created this blog to provide information on how to renew SAP SSL Certificates – An Alternative Way.
  • LINKED BLOG - MANUAL SAP SSL CONFIGURATION FOR S/4 HANA (ABAP AND HANA) SYSTEM from OS_LEVEL #ATR
  • We can consider any one of the method (blog) to renew SAP SSL whichever suitable w.r.t SAP System Compliance.
  • Usually, SAP System (SSL Enabled) will go down if SSL Certificate expired/Invalid – resulting in “Server Resource Exhaust” error with WP_KILL status.

  • Check – sapcontrol -nr instno -function GetProcessList  || Get SystemInstanceList

  • All WPs will stuck in “KILLING” status – dpmon pf=profilename -> “p” Wp menu.

  • R3trans and WP logs – /usr/sap/SID/DINST/work

  • Usually, Prefer dev_w0 first rather than other logs. SAP System start all WPs in ascending order which dev_w0 will be the first one to start and have exact WP issue logs.

  • In my scenario, SAP System configured to run with SSL – ABAP (SAPSSLS) and HANA DB (SAPSRV) and its certificate expired.

SOLUTION:

  • METHOD 1: Either disable SSL as of now, Restart SAP System -> Renew Certificates in STRUST -> Add Renewed Certificate in Database SAPSRV PSE as well (To make ABAP trust DB and vice versa).

         [OR]

  • METHOD 2: Renew SAP SSL Manually by regenerating PSE File (SAPSSL*) with sapgenpse method. Please refer my blog – MANUAL SAP SSL CONFIGURATION FOR S/4 HANA (ABAP AND HANA) SYSTEM from OS_LEVEL #ATR
  • As we already seen how to renew SSL manually via OS level (sapgenpse), We are going to proceed with METHOD 1 Solution.
  • No need to touch ABAP profile(icm) since we just need to start system without SSL and enable SSL post renewing certificates via STRUST.
  • To connect WPs ABAP -> DB – Disable/Comment below SSL parameter in R3trans ENV and in DB.
  • /usr/sap/HDB/HDB02/servername/global.ini - Host Level – ssl from on to off.
  • /usr/sap/HDB/SYS/global/hdb/custom/config/DB_HDB/global.ini - Database Level
  • /usr/sap/HDB/SYS/global/hdb/custom/config - System level
  • Change – dbs_hdb_connect_property=ENCRYPT=FALSE in dbenv.csh or sapenv.csh - /home/sidadm.

 

  • Restart DB then ABAP. ABAP will connect to DB (without SSL).

NOTE:

  • HTTPs connection will fail/insecure since icm/verify https client still enabled (1). But ABAP System will start and connect to DB.
  • Both ABAP and ASCS Instance should be restarted to take SAP env variables from scratch. Else, it will still consider SSL ENCRYPT TRUE and fail to connect DB.
  • We can use STRUST to renew certificates and then enable SSL.
  • Use the certificate response and renew the certificate – Your Company Root CA/Intermediate CA.

  • Add server/root/intermediate certificates in ABAP SAPSSLS Certification lists as well.
  • Recreate SAPSRV.pse & SAPSRV_INTERNAL with renewed certificate. We can export pfx file and certificates from STRUST itself.

  • We need to renew sapsrv_internal as well since it will act as Internal SSL KeyStore and it will be checked while starting DB.

  • Command – sapgenpse import_p12 -r root.cer -r intermediate.cer -p psefile.pse pfxfile.pfx

  • Add server/root/intermediate certificates of SAPSRV PSE in ABAP SAPSSLS pse file (via STRUST) for ABAP–HANA DB trust and establish connection.

  • We have already added the same since we are using same (single) certificate both ABAP and HANA DB.
  • We can also use sapgenpse command to add manually instead of using STRUST-> sapgenpse maintain_pk -a certificatename.cer -p SAPSSLS.pse
  • We can delete expired certificates in the list if not required.
  • We have successfully renewed ABAP SAPSSLS as well as DB SAPSRV/SAPSRV_INTERNAL.
  • Certificates of SAPSRV added in ABAP SAPSSLS Lists for ABAP – HANA DB Trust.
  • Enable SSL parameters now and restart ABAP and HANA DB.

  • We have successfully renewed and configured SSL Connection for SAP System.

WANNA KNOW MORE INFORMATION?

What if?

  • You have maintained ICM parameter – Verify HTTPs client in ASCS profile as well. [Usually done in Productive Environment running with SSL]

  • For S/4 HANA Systems (Majorly 2020 and above), Systems will have Integrated Webdispatcher - attached to Message server which will be used majorly for Web Assistant/Enable Now purposes. All the requests will go via WD only. If you have maintained Client Verification parameter in ASCS, then SSL verification will be done between ABAP and WD once system started.
  • System will do SSL handshake between ABAP and Message server (sec) instances so that it trusts ABAP server certificate and allow incoming/send outgoing requests via Web dispatcher (Message server) to target and vice versa based on Filter URLs and trust certificates.
  • Server will be ABAP Instance sec (SAPSSL*.PSE -Secure Store) certificate
  • Client will be Web Dispatcher (Message server) Instance sec (SAPSSLC.PSE) certificate
  • System will run fine except ICM requests. All ICM requests will fail with SSL Connection error.
  • We can identify this scenario by checking the IP - Same IP (local/VM server) will be mentioned in both ICM and Web Dispatcher logs.
  • ICM:

  • WEB DISPATCHER:

  • Solution - Once Certificate renewed, SAY ABAP SAPSSL* Secure Store (SAPSSLS – My Scenario), Add its Root and Intermediate certificates in ASCS – SAPSSLC pse file.
  • It will be a one-time activity since root and intermediate certificate won’t change mostly for the company.
  • Command -> sapgenpse maintain_pk -a root.cer -p SAPSSLC.pse
  • I have already added certificates in ASCS SAPSSLC.
  • Web Dispatcher and ICM requests works fine.

 

Thanks for Visiting !

Please do connect and follow my Linked In Profile - https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajaytr66/

AJAY TR - ATR - SAP BASIS ADMINISTRATOR

entry.title: Is PPTC Card (BIRT) getting deprecated? If so, can you please share the deprecation timeline.
entry.content: Is PPTC Card (BIRT) getting deprecated? If so, can you please share the deprecation timeline.

entry.title: Re: Can we restrict user to create a public version in SA...
entry.content: I'm not sure what is missed in your setting. Without version maintain right, user should not be able to create public version in version management.

entry.title: Unable to access SAP Build Code Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi,

I am unable to create a full stack application on SAP Build Code I get below error:

Error: Insufficient privileges to perform this action.

Correlation Id: 6bf6f39e-7760-4255-55cd-167d13773ead
It seems that you are using an incorrect Identity Provider to access this dev space. To resolve this issue, you can either log out and sign in with the correct Identity Provider on the sign-in page where the project was created, or contact your administrator to obtain the right Identity Provider details. Correlation Id: c170b3b7-8e01-4ee3-69f5-e7da7ec7289c

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud not all filter elements are displayed.
entry.content: If I want to filter a table by key figures, selected elements are shown to me in the filter on the right. All available elements are displayed on the left. Unfortunately I only see % Win Rate (#Closed Opps) as the last item to select. I can't find Lost Rate by scrolling on the left side. I would have to go over the search magnifying glass and type in the name so I could find it. Why don't the selected items appear in the Available Items? Is there a limit to the list? Normally a "next" button should appear. Even that cannot be seen.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA API for Changes in Material (MM)
entry.content:
Hi @_JohnL_ 

 

An API / CDS view for Change Documents ( tables CDHDR , CDPOS ) is not available.

 

The CDS views I_CHANGEDOCUMENT / I_ChangeDocumentItem are unreleased also

 

the Entity A_ChangeRecordHistory belongs to the API API_CHANGERECORDHISTORY

 

This api deals with Change Numbers / Change Records which is used for updating BOM's and Routings

and is different from "Change Documents"

I know Development are aware of the request for a CDS view for Change Documents but i don't know 

when a planned release date / version is planned for when it will be available

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: UPDATE statement delete rows
entry.content: Update will not delete a record, do you cleat other fields, what's your exact code?

entry.title: Rename standard fiori tile in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good afternoon.

I want to ask a question and it is specifically: how can I rename an APP? 

I attach document

Thanks and regards. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Rename standard fiori tile in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Publi...
entry.content:
Hello Team,

It is not possible to rename a standard fiori tile in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

It is currently possible in private edition as there is a provision to create custom catalogs. This is not possible in cloud and you can check the below KBA :

2633830 - No Option To Create Business Catalogs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Finally! we have an open source LLM trained on SAP APIs and ABAP
entry.content:
Maybe I am missing something, but if it's
ls_mara TYPE mara,

Then there's no
ls_mara-maktx.

(MAKTX is in MAKT...)

-> Syntax errror, in the "Corrected syntax;"

entry.title: Creation of an new Company Code.
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Our management requires us to setup a new Company code DIGITS in our SAP S/4HANA Public cloud environment.

May we know what are prerequisite, procedure notes  and/or items that we need to take note to setup a new Company code (Organization structure) in S/4HANA Public cloud?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Creation of an new Company Code.
entry.content:
Refer to the KBA to create an Company Code 2759011 - How to add a new entity to the organization structure?

Also refer to the Roadmap Link for any information related to the SSCUI. 

Note: Once specified, the company code cannot be changed. If you need to change the company code, you need to create a new work agreement manually in the Manage Workforce app. Refer to the KBA 3327580 - Company Code is in an unmodifiable state in app Manage Workforce for the same

entry.title: Re: Reminder email of open tasks in My Inbox
entry.content: Hi, the page cannot be foud

entry.title: Re: Local Development in SAP Cloud Foundry: A Guide for Software Developers
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing difficulty in passing the passcode to the prompt. It is not accepting the passcode (obtained from CF account) after CTRL+V and even after right click. Not able to figure out if the passcode is pasted or not.

I have a MTA with multiple applications(modules or microservices) defined with type as nodejs. The ui module itself is the approuter. We deploy the MTAR to SAP BTP CF which deploys all the modules as applications in cloud foundry and we run the application locally using pm2 process manager. How can I run all the modules in local cloud foundry environment? What will be folder structure for MTA with multiple modules of type nodejs? 

Thanks,

Ravindra

entry.title: Re: NWEngine testing
entry.content: I need that too. Is there no solution for this?

entry.title: A standard function module is overwriting my logic in GGB1.

I am having trouble finding the userexit for saving  FB01

I am only able to see SAP HANA Database Module and no other option (Approuter Configuration), i don't know what i am doing wrong can u plz help?

Thanks,
dega

entry.title: Re: Tracing call-off purchase orders negotiated savings

entry.title: LMS iContent Server issue - Upload Errors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to upload the scorm file in the  iContent SFTP ( Zip file size 6GB) but i am getting the attached error.

i tried many times but still the same issue, i checked in the Zip file imsmanifest.xml file is present.

what could be the reason for this?

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'Unleash the Power of Business Process Transformation' (September 5, 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual

September 05, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on ‘Unleash the Power of Business Process Transformation’ virtually taking place on September 5, 2024. Please find the current agenda here.

In a world of rapid change, the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite and SAP LeanIX allow organizations to achieve their maximum potential through continuous process transformation and improvement. Everything a company does is the sum of all their business processes. Intelligent enterprises always stay on top of how the company runs its business processes and how flexibly it can adapt to the process execution. SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite helps companies make the intelligent enterprise a reality: understand the operations instantly and holistically, react and fix immediately. SAP LeanIX helps companies build and transform technology landscapes to support evolving business strategies and operationalize innovation.

Join SAP experts and our customers to learn about the capabilities of SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite and SAP LeanIX and how they can help you in the journey to process excellence, supported by SAP MaxAttention. 

The health and well-being of our customers, employees, and business partners is a top priority for SAP. We offer a virtual event format which allows you to have an interactive, digital experience in a safe environment.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: Modify address partner in sales order
entry.content: How did you fill PARTNERS (PARTNERS-TRANSPZONE) parameter

entry.title: Re: Modify address partner in sales order
entry.content:
Hello @snoozed20 

The notes:

  • 366265 - How should I fill the BAPI parameters?
  • 205775 - Partner change in CHANGE BAPI

provide hints on how to deal with addresses in SD BAPIs.

The main point is that BAPIPARNRC-ADDR_LINK needs to be provided and the address needs to be specified in full.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hello Everyone. This is Pravallika

entry.title: Re: Product Updates for SAP Build Code – July 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Hi Jelena,

Thanks a lot for your feedback. I'm sorry if this was misleading. Currently there are no plans to discontinue SAP Business Application Studio. But if you want to use the additional features coming with SAP Build Code you have to change to SAP Build Code. 

Best regards,

Birgit

entry.title: Is it possible that someone (poweruser) can publish the private version of another user?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement where a user is only allowed to enter some value in the story but should not be able to publish the content.

I thought of an option where user will create a private version , enter some values and share the version with approver. Once the approver is satisfied he/she will publish the content. But, as i understood that a private version can only be published by the owner or administrator. 

Definitely we cannot provide admin access to multiple users.

Is there any way by which we can achieve this.

 

Thanks,

Saif

entry.title: Re: sap S/4HANA SERVICE - REQUEST MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi Dequan
Thank you for your response.

In that case. please let me know the significance of T-code IW56 wherein we have an option to create a service notification: service request ?

Here, what do you think would be the T-code for service request?

entry.title: Re: sap S/4HANA SERVICE - REQUEST MANAGEMENT
entry.content: Hi Dequan, Thank you for your response.

entry.title: Re: Can we restrict user to create a public version in SAC planning?
Re: Can we restrict user to create a public version in SAC planning?
entry.content:
Hi ,

Not sure what is happening here, but i would like to understand the behavior of roles here.

When i uncheck the "execute" option of publish content, user is still able to publish the data from the top button of publish content in the story.

But when I uncheck the option of "manage" in Public files, then user is neither able to create public version nor he is able to publish the content to any public version. 

 Can someone explain here what is happening.

Thanks,

Saif

entry.title: Unable to upgrade SAP HANA 2305 to SAP HANA 2405
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I am encountering an issue where SAP is not opening. Below is the history of installations and upgrades I have performed, which might help in understanding the problem:

  1. Installed: SAP Business One 10.0 HANA SP2402 (Security) Hotfix
    Result: SAP working fine

  2. Upgraded: From SAP Business One 10.0 HANA SP2402 HF to SAP HANA (10.00.250) FP 2405
    Result: SAP app not opening

  3. Upgraded: From SAP HANA (10.00.250) FP 2405 to SAP HANA (10.00.250) FP 2405 HOTFIX1
    Result: SAP app not opening

  4. Uninstalled: SAP HANA (10.00.250) FP 2405 HOTFIX1
    Installed: SAP HANA (10.00.210) FP 2305
    Result: SAP working fine

  5. Upgraded: SAP HANA (10.00.210) FP 2305 to SAP HANA (10.00.250) FP 2405
    Result: Unable to upgrade database

Troubleshooting Steps Taken:

  • Uninstalled and reinstalled the application server
  • Deleted the SBO Common database from HANA Studio
  • Created the SBO Common database from HANA setup SAP HANA2405

Could you please assist in diagnosing this issue or suggest any additional troubleshooting steps?

Please find print screen when facing issue database up gradation 

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,

Neeraj Upadhyay

entry.title: Re: sap S/4HANA SERVICE - REQUEST MANAGEMENT
entry.content: Private cloud.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Process Automation Trail Service Error
entry.content: @SAPBuildProcessAutomation Hi Team, I am still facing issues in accessing the trial account for BPA. It's UI is broken, after creation of the new artefact in BPA. Can you please help on this ?

entry.title: Re: Can Overview Page use OData v4 to configure analysis...
entry.content: First of all, thank you very much for your response and assistance! I referred to the document you provided and added the following to my annotation.xml: <Annotation Term="Aggregation.ApplySupported"> <PropertyValue Property="GroupableProperties"> <Collection> <PropertyPath>geoName</PropertyPath> </Collection> </PropertyValue> </Annotation> However, the chart still does not appear. Is there something I might have written incorrectly or missed? Thank you again for your help!

entry.title: Re: Result of recording(QM) column grey out in QA02
entry.content: Hello ArnoBrouwer, Thanks for you responce, I need to make it not editable for specific user and I need to restrict them from making changes.

entry.title: ABAP CDS View Case Statement and Join Condition
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new to CDS View, Can someone help me with the below logics

If PERSNUMBER is null in BUT000, get the ADDRNUMBER from BUT020 and pass to ADR6 for email address - this one in join condition

If email address entry is only one assign that, If multiple email addresses found, pick where ADR6-FLGDEFAULT is 'X' 

Thanks in Advance !!

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Modify address partner in sales order
entry.content:
Thank you very much for your answer Raymond_giuseppi

I think the problem comes from what you say in principle did not fill it because I did not see that there is also a field LZONE the case is that I have filled it and now if you try to update it and I see that it goes through SD_PARTNER_UPDATE, but it is doing it with UPDZ = I, I think there must be some flag to change it and put it to U instead of I.

SD_PARTNER_UPDATE

 

Because with I it is trying to insert and it gives DUMP and I want to update. I think there must be some flag to change it and put it to U instead of I.

Thank you very much

entry.title: Resend SDS(Safety data sheet)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement, at present SDS(safety data sheet) is automatically send to respective vendor once it is generated, requirement is that can we resend safety datasheet again without generating new one. is there any API/FM available for this. I tried FM CVEQ_RDO_SEND_TO_INTERNET but it is not working as expected.

please share your ideas 

Thank

entry.title: Re: MDG DQM:Employing rules in central governance & mass processing in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi @madigio :

The central governance check box is only to denote that the rule is implemented in Central governance using BADI or BRF+. It doesn't have any technical implications on the rule modelling

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Master data and high end data validation using relations in SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model
entry.content:
Now that you are familiar with the basics of relations in SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model, let’s dive deeper and see how we could utilize relations to create Master data for String data type and high end data validations.  

Chapter 1: Master data using relations

One way to introduce master data to SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model is through Association field and specifying the Master data function which will hold the master data values for it. To know more about it visit the documentation about Association field and how to configure master data. This would be creating of managed association, compared to unmanaged associations that you can build via relations.  

Speaking of relations, the other way to do it is using them. This option will allow you to assign master data even for the String fields. This is specially useful to fields coming from some external sources through connections since they can’t be registered as Association fields, rather as String fields.  
 
Note: If this master data assignment option has been used, remember that this string field will be assigned with master data only in the Model which has the relation to the master data table. If the same field is used in some other Model then it will be just a normal string accepting any string values.

To configure this we would need to specify the following:

 

Procedure:

Step 1: Maintaining Relation ID and Description 

As we did before we need to maintain ID and Description of the relation.

Step 2: Maintaining the Type of relation to Association to one 

When we are configuring this type of relation only Association to One can be used.

Step 3: Choosing the Target Model 

Target Model will act as Master Data Function for the String field we want to define master data for. This can be a Model Entity, Model Reference and Model View or Model HANA which have a field with ‘Key’ Value Help Tag. 

Step 4: Maintaining the Join Condition 

If a Target Model has multiple fields with ‘Key’ as Value Help Tag, which can be the case for Model HANA, then the important thing that needs to be setup is the Join Condition so the system knows to which ‘Key’ to equate the values of the String field we are creating master data for. If it has only one ‘Key’ field than system will use it and you don’t have to explicitly maintain the Join Condition. You can still choose to do so and get the same result and provide some additional ‘on conditions’ which will limit the values.

 

Spoiler
To maintain ‘on condition’ you can write Join condition in the following format: <RelationName>.<KeyFieldFromTarget> = <FieldFromRootEntity> AND <FieldFromRootEntity> = <‘Value’> where values inside of <> are specific to your case. 

Step 5: Choosing the Validation Type

And lastly to indicate that you want to create Master data with relations you need to setup the Validation type to Value Help. 

Step 6: Choosing the Validation Field 

With Validation Field you will be specifying the field from the root entity for which you want to create master data. 

 

Example for Master Data 

Let’s visualize this in an example. Our scenario will have:  

  • Documents and Items tables related together with Composition of Many relation 
  • Cost Centers Model Entity which holds Master data for Cost Center Association field 
  • A mapping table between Countries and Regions 
  • Periods Model Entity which holds Master data for Period String field 

 

 

Requirements 

  1. Create Master data for String field Period and use Periods Model Entity as Master Data function 
  2. Limit the values of the master data to 2024 and 2023 with the ‘on condition’ 

 

Requirement 1 and 2 - Let’s see how to configure this in the system:

 

Now let’s see on Show screen if we get a value help for field Period and if the values are limited to 2024. 

As you can see you can still see all of the values that are present in the Master data function, but choosing only the value 2024 is allowed. The ‘on condition’ is not mandatory and if it was not set then all the values from the master Data function would be accepted but values outside of master data would not be accepted. So let’s delete the on condition so all of the master data values are excepted. And our relation would look like this now. 

 

Chapter 2: High end data validations using relations 

With relations you could create all kinds of validations that suit your use case and achieve the high end data validation, but let’s see how to configure relations for this purpose and what are the different options we can specify.  

To configure this we would need to specify the following:

 

Procedure:

Step 1: Maintaining Relation ID and Description 

As we did before we need to maintain ID and Description of the relation. 

Spoiler
When used for data validation, description of the relation will be shown to the user if some of the data records get validated. So it should be as user friendly as possible, for example if we are validating if the DateFrom is before DateTo then the message should state something like: ‘DateFrom should be before DateTo!’. To get more detailed message user can also add the following: ‘Entity {0} Record {1} Field {2} Value {3} Target {4}’ where the arguments in the curly brackets will be replaced by the system with the data record which is being validated specific information. 

Step 2: Maintaining the Type of relation to Association to many 

Data validations can only be used with Association to Many relation type, so this is the one we need to choose while building the validations.

Step 3: Choosing the Target Model 
 
And speaking of that, the Target Model can be a different Model or the same Model where we are creating the relation in, or in other words root entity.

Step 4: Maintaining the Join Condition if backlink doesn’t exist  

What’s important is for the system to know how to connect the root entity and Target Model. To declare this you can use Join Condition or a backlink field.  

Step 5: Choosing the Validation Type 

Next thing that needs to be determined is when we have multiple matching records from root entity and Target Model is 

  • If we want to have at least one of them to satisfy the condition from the Default Filter and ‘on condition’ we use Fulfilled 
  • If we want that none of them satisfy them we use Not Fulfilled. 

 

Spoiler

Fulfilled will ensure that at least one matching record satisfies the condition set in Default Filter and ‘on condition’ 

Not Fulfilled will ensure that zero records satisfy the condition set in Default Filter and ‘on condition’ 

 

Step 6: Maintaining Default Filter 

Which brings us to the expression which we need to maintain in Default Filter, which will hold the logic of our validation.

 

Spoiler
If the root entity and Target Model have the same field names then in Default filter to specify that the field is coming from the root entity you need to put _m. before it.

 

Step 7: Choosing the Validation Field 

And lastly to specify some field from the root entity which we want to be validated we can maintain Validation field and then our validation message will be more detailed and will indicate this field in the message. 

In the message we will get more detailed information then:

 

Example for Data Validation: 

Still with the same scenario we will build validations. 

 

Requirements: 

  1. Validate that at least one item per document contains Period ‘2024’ 
  2. Validate that no item contains Cost Center ‘CC1’ 
  3.  Validate that Country matches the Region according to a Mapping table of Countries and Regions 

 

Requirement 1:  We will add some validation checks to our Model Entities, starting with the check that will ensure that at least one Item per Document contains the value 2024 for Period. To configure it we will go to Documents and create an Association to Many relation. For this use case we will use Fulfilled Validation type because it will check if at least one record satisfies the condition in Default filter and ‘on condition’.

Configuration would look like this: 

On the Show screen we will only be able to create the record if there is at least one item with Period 2024.

 

Requirement 2: Now what if we want that none of the Items fulfill the expression we maintained in the Default filter, then we would use Not Fulfilled Validation type and for this let’s create a validation which will ensure that no item has Cost Center CC1. Since Cost Center is an Association Field to refer to it in Default Filter we need to refer to the Key field of it’s Master data function. 

Now on Show screen we will not be able to choose CC1. 

 

Requirement 3: And lastly we would like to make sure that according to the mapping table between Country and Region we want to ensure that we choose the correct Region for a Country. Since here our root entity and Target Model have the same field names to tell the system that the field is coming from the root entity in the Default Filter you need to specify _m. before fields name. If they are not the same this can be omitted.

On the Show screen if we choose a Region that doesn’t match the Country we will get a validation message. 

Spoiler

All the validations we created, either the master data ones or custom ones will also be present if you Import Data through modeling or Activities, or try to insert via Writer. There is an option to turn these errors into notifications, warnings or information so the data can be imported but with a message displayed to the user, and for this you can use Reclassify Error Message. 

To showcase this we will change the relations we had to: 

1. Information:




2. Notification




3. Warning



Now we would not get errors if the data doesn’t satisfy these validations rather information, notification and a warning and data will be successfully saved. 

 

I hope you learned about how to tackle different scenarios and that you already got an idea on how to utilize these validations for your use cases. The sky is the limit! Have fun modeling and until next time! 😊

entry.title: About the A/R Reserve Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I am asking a question relevant to SAP Business One. Is the A/R Reserve Invoice available in the Indian localization? If it is available how can we setup. Thank You.

Malshi.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible that someone (poweruser) can publish t...
entry.content:
@saikhancs35 

Private version can only be published by the user ( pvt version owner) itself. Admins can only delete all private versions but they cannot publish it for others.

May be create a dedicated version for this user or use some other dimension to separate this input and later copy it to main version.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Binance (TR) Referans Kimliği Nedir?
entry.content: Dünyada en çok kullanılan, ömür boyu geçerli, en yüksek indirim oranına sahip Binance TR Türkiye referans kodudur. Binance TR kripto para borsasına kayıt olurken “Referans Kimliği” yazan yere “F7966D77” yazınız. Binance global referans kodu ise "C15HJGN1" tercih edilmektedir.
